title: Track Your Songs
subtitle: Enter your email or phone to see the status of your ApolloSong and when it'll be delivered.

guarantee.title: We complete every order—you're covered!
guarantee.description: We have a 100% song completion rate. If you can't find your song, it's usually due to a mistyped email or email filtering. Just email us at {email} and we'll resend your song right away. We reply within 3-5 days during holidays, often sooner.

form.searchHint: Try email first. If you can't find it, search by phone.

notFound.title: Can't Find Your Order?
notFound.paragraph1: It might be because you mistyped your email when ordering. Many customers accidentally mistype their email address when placing their order, and that's totally fine – we'll help you find it.
notFound.paragraph2: First, please double-check that you're using the same email address you used when placing your order. Common mix-ups include using @gmail.com when your actual email is @icloud.com, or @hotmail.com instead of @outlook.com, and vice versa. Or it can be a typo on the email address itself.
notFound.paragraph3: If you're still not finding it, just reach out to us at {email} with the following information and we'll locate your order right away. We reply within 3-5 days during holidays, often sooner.
helpList: The date you placed your order
A general overview of the survey you filled out
notFound.supportNote: We're here to support you every step of the way. Please reach out if you have any issues and we'll do our best to fix them right away.

musicianTip.title: Did our song touch your heart?
musicianTip.subtitle: Your support makes a difference
musicianTip.description: We charge a **symbolic price** for our songs so we can reach as many people as possible. But we know the **true value and dedication** each song requires to achieve this level of quality. If our music touched your heart, your contribution goes **directly to the talented musicians** who created it.

revision.cardDescription: Something wasn't quite right? Free if it's our mistake, $9.90 if incorrect info was provided.
revision.modalDescription: Your song will enter revision and we'll analyze it within 48 hours, sending you a corrected version.
revision.modalFee: If it's our mistake, the revision is **free**. If due to **incorrect information** you provided, a fee of **$9.90** will be charged only after delivering the new version.
revision.statusDescription: Your request is being analyzed. You'll receive a new version within 48 hours.
revision.cancelConfirmDescription: You'll keep the song as is. This action uses 1 of your 2 available revisions.
revision.finalVersionDescription: This is the final version of {name}'s song. You have used all 2 available revisions.
revision.addNotesDescription: Forgot to mention something? Add more details about what needs to be corrected.
revision.addNotesPlaceholder: Write here what you forgot to mention...

items.question: How do I download my song to my phone or computer?
items.answer:
On mobile (iPhone/Android):
1. Tap the Download button below the player
2. The MP3 file will be saved to your Downloads or Files folder
3. On iPhone, you can open it in the Files app and save to iCloud

On computer:
1. Click the Download button
2. The file will be saved to your Downloads folder
3. You can move it anywhere or import it to iTunes/local Spotify

items.question: How do I request a revision of my song?
items.answer:
If something wasn't quite right, you can request a revision:

1. Go to the Orders tab and select your song
2. Scroll down to find the Request Revision card
3. Click and describe what needs to be adjusted
4. We'll review within 48h and send the corrected version

Important: If it was our mistake, the revision is free. If it was due to incorrect information, there's a $9.90 fee.

items.question: How do I put my song on Spotify?
items.answer:
With our VIP Distribution service, your song becomes available on all platforms:

• Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music
• Instagram, TikTok, Facebook
• Deezer, Amazon Music and more

How to get it:
1. Go to the Extras tab
2. Find the "VIP Distribution" card
3. Click "Yes, make it public"

We create a professional cover with the person's photo and your song becomes public for anyone to listen!

seo.title: Track Your Song Order | ApolloSong
seo.description: Check the status of your personalized custom song order. Enter your email to see when your ApolloSong will be delivered.
